params.SpellDescription: Whenever target creature deals combat damage to a non-Wall creature this turn, destroy that non-Wall creature. When the targeted creature leaves the battlefield this turn, sacrifice CARDNAME. Activate only before blockers are declared.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Whenever target creature deals combat damage to a non-Wall creature this turn, destroy that non-Wall creature. When the targeted creature leaves the battlefield this turn, sacrifice CARDNAME. Activate only before blockers are declared.
